samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="PIPE_STAGES" value_description="[2:0]">Pipeline stages of the adder.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>Registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
        <reg id="i_en_reg" width_description="[2:0]">Pipeline stage enable signals.</reg>
        <reg id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]">Input operand A for each pipeline stage.</reg>
        <reg id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]">Input operand B for each pipeline stage.</reg>
        <reg id="result_reg" width_description="[64:0]">Sum for each pipeline stage.</reg>
        <reg id="o_en_reg" width_description="[2:0]">Output enable signals for each pipeline stage.</reg>
        <description>Calculate the sum values for each pipeline stage.</description>
        <assign id="sum[0]">adda[0] + addb[0] + (PIPE_STAGES[0] ? carry[0] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[1]">adda[1] + addb[1] + (PIPE_STAGES[1] ? carry[1] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[2]">adda[2] + addb[2] + (PIPE_STAGES[2] ? carry[2] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[3]">adda[3] + addb[3] + (PIPE_STAGES[3] ? carry[3] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[4]">adda[4] + addb[4] + (PIPE_STAGES[4] ? carry[4] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[5]">adda[5] + addb[5] + (PIPE_STAGES[5] ? carry[5] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[6]">adda[6] + addb[6] + (PIPE_STAGES[6] ? carry[6] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[7]">adda[7] + addb[7] + (PIPE_STAGES[7] ? carry[7] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[8]">adda[8] + addb[8] + (PIPE_STAGES[8] ? carry[8] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[9]">adda[9] + addb[9] + (PIPE_STAGES[9] ? carry[9] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[10]">adda[10] + addb[10] + (PIPE_STAGES[10] ? carry[10] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[11]">adda[11] + addb[11] + (PIPE_STAGES[11] ? carry[11] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[12]">adda[12] + addb[12] + (PIPE_STAGES[12] ? carry[12] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[13]">adda[13] + addb[13] + (PIPE_STAGES[13] ? carry[13] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[14]">adda[14] + addb[14] + (PIPE_STAGES[14] ? carry[14] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[15]">adda[15] + addb[15] + (PIPE_STAGES[15] ? carry[15] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[16]">adda[16] + addb[16] + (PIPE_STAGES[16] ? carry[16] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[17]">adda[17] + addb[17] + (PIPE_STAGES[17] ? carry[17] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[18]">adda[18] + addb[18] + (PIPE_STAGES[18] ? carry[18] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[19]">adda[19] + addb[19] + (PIPE_STAGES[19] ? carry[19] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[20]">adda[20] + addb[20] + (PIPE_STAGES[20] ? carry[20] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[21]">adda[21] + addb[21] + (PIPE_STAGES[21] ? carry[21] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[22]">adda[22] + addb[22] + (PIPE_STAGES[22] ? carry[22] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[23]">adda[23] + addb[23] + (PIPE_STAGES[23] ? carry[23] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[24]">adda[24] + addb[24] + (PIPE_STAGES[24] ? carry[24] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[25]">adda[25] + addb[25] + (PIPE_STAGES[25] ? carry[25] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[26]">adda[26] + addb[26] + (PIPE_STAGES[26] ? carry[26] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[27]">adda[27] + addb[27] + (PIPE_STAGES[27] ? carry[27] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[28]">adda[28] + addb[28] + (PIPE_STAGES[28] ? carry[28] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[29]">adda[29] + addb[29] + (PIPE_STAGES[29] ? carry[29] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[30]">adda[30] + addb[30] + (PIPE_STAGES[30] ? carry[30] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[31]">adda[31] + addb[31] + (PIPE_STAGES[31] ? carry[31] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[32]">adda[32] + addb[32] + (PIPE_STAGES[32] ? carry[32] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[33]">adda[33] + addb[33] + (PIPE_STAGES[33] ? carry[33] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[34]">adda[34] + addb[34] + (PIPE_STAGES[34] ? carry[34] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[35]">adda[35] + addb[35] + (PIPE_STAGES[35] ? carry[35] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[36]">adda[36] + addb[36] + (PIPE_STAGES[36] ? carry[36] : 0).</assign>
        <assign id="sum[37]">adda[37] + addb[37] + (PIPE_STAGES[37] ? carry[37] : 0).</
